title: Password Reset
content: Employees can reset their password from the account settings page under security. Password reset emails expire in 24 hours.

title: Leave Policy
content: Employees are entitled to 20 paid leave days annually. Leave requests must be submitted through the HR portal.

title: Work From Home
content: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval.

title: Expense Reimbursement
content: Employees must submit expense receipts within 15 days using the finance portal.

title: Refund Policy
content: Customers can request refunds within 30 days if unused.
